dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I have always been really fast.

dialogue.speaker: TEACHER
dialogue.line: Zack is the fastest! The first place sprinter!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: You slow goofs!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Zack Lee (Five years old, New Star Kindergarten)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: In elementary school too.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Give me your Digimon cards!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: And in middle school.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: His punch is so fast! The finals! Is he really going to be a middle schooler?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: After entering high school.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: So you're Zack Lee? Runner-up at the middle school boxing? Just behave well. Don't you... You got the same hair style as us. Dare look at us, huh?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Let's just change our hair.

dialogue.speaker: ZACK LEE
dialogue.line: I didn't see that coming.

dialogue.speaker: ZACK LEE
dialogue.line: I've always been speedy, so life was so easy, but now!

dialogue.speaker: ZACK LEE
dialogue.line: Dodged again!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Wooah! Incredible! First time I've seen it! Dodged them all!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Who the hell is this guy?! He avoided every attack from Zack! So fast, scary. Awesome!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: He's not just good at watching!

dialogue.speaker: ZACK LEE
dialogue.line: Gosh! He's reading my shoulders and moving!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: This guy has a lot of experience!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: He's not easy!

dialogue.speaker: ZACK LEE
dialogue.line: Mira is watching.

dialogue.speaker: ZACK LEE
dialogue.line: It's humiliating.

dialogue.speaker: ZACK LEE
dialogue.line: Then! It's coming!

dialogue.speaker: ZACK LEE
dialogue.line: This coming! I won't see it! But him... I can't avoid it!

dialogue.speaker: ZACK LEE
dialogue.line: Huh? I almost got hit. Whew! What?!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: He caught it?! What did I just see? Damn! Woooah!

dialogue.speaker: ZACK LEE
dialogue.line: My punch... Sick! Never seen that! He anticipated it?

dialogue.speaker: ZACK LEE
dialogue.line: This, dick!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: He's obviously seen his share of fisticuffs! A real fighter!

dialogue.speaker: ZACK LEE
dialogue.line: Oh man! It's getting harder to dodge!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I can't just keep dodging! I'm going to get hit after all! He must hate to fight! Maybe only his body is fast? Why does he just dodge? Zack will win, right?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Someone, of course, stop him!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: As soon as I saw them... Was she happy after giving birth to him? Pigs are born from pigs. Strip both naked. I would have had an abortion. It's a sow. His mom is a pig too. I remembered the reason that the explosive emotions came up from deep inside. What on Earth, you ass! Did I do wrong to them?

dialogue.speaker: ZACK LEE
dialogue.line: I can't breathe!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: That's how you... Oh! Throw your impressive first punch! Wow, he's down!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Aim for the solar plexus, for the first punch.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: One attempt, his body. One punch! You saw that? And he's down! No way!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Oh! Awesome! What? One punch! Sick! Incredible!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: It was all a first for me. Daniel, you are the man! Did you work out? Was it really that hard? He must be in pain. Looking down my opponent. Ruthless one punch! Oh! What the hell is he?

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: He doesn't wanna fight! I guess he had no choice.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Oh, Danny! Damn cool!

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: And this strange reaction... M-Mira! Lower your eyes! Did you enjoy that? I saw everyone who smiled! I will pluck your eyes out! Don't look at me!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: And for the first time... So he's the same guy as those jerks. Anyway, when predators fight, it always turns out bad for guys like me. Someone saw me with fear, just like I used to look at others.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Let's beat that dick. The transfer? But Zack was no match. Let's come at him all at once. There are three of us. One grab him from behind, the other two take the front. Wow, you have no shame. But we can't let him be like this.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I'll grab his arms, with my Herculean strength! I don't see it. Right, clever.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Let's beat him up today after school. Deal! Let's kick his ass.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Zack Lee in one shot? Yeah. Big news. What, too?

dialogue.speaker: VIN JIN
dialogue.line: You think he's better looking than me? Just say it, huh?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Vocal & Dance Dept. Vin Jin

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Eli! Did you see the transfer in the Fashion Department? Eli, oh, he's good looking but you're better. They say beauty... He hit Zack Lee? Oh, Zack Lee lost?

dialogue.speaker: ELI JANG
dialogue.line: I don't care about fighting, but if he's good looking, shall I ask him to be my hair model?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Beauty Dept. (The Only Man) Eli Jang

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: You said he's handsome? Yep. And popular? Yep. And he can fight? Yep.

dialogue.speaker: EUNTAE LEE
dialogue.line: He's as bad as Eli. Don't cry. They both are going down.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Architecture (Man of Men) Dept. Euntae Lee

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Ah, ah! Gotta pee!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Jay? He's so taciturn.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: What?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Oh! What's this?!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Jay?!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Jiban Cafe Jale

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Moontae Son

summary: Zack Lee, a naturally fast and strong fighter, is humiliated when he can't land a single hit on a new transfer student, Daniel, who effortlessly dodges all his attacks. Daniel, triggered by past trauma and bullying, unleashes a powerful single punch, knocking Zack out, and then reacts aggressively to Mira watching, revealing a darker side. Other students, including Vin Jin, Eli Jang, and Euntae Lee, discuss Daniel's looks and fighting prowess, while Jay makes a silent appearance.
